B_ordered_increments.name: Introduce typed RC-600 planner core skeleton
B_ordered_increments.objective: Create a minimal, typed planner-core package boundary so domain models can be added incrementally without UI coupling.

impact.schema: adds root MemoryPlan and shared scalar/enums placeholders
impact.state: adds initial immutable planner state container
impact.testing: adds smoke tests for model import/instantiation

definition_of_done: Core package exists with typed root objects and no domain semantics guessed.
No UI files import planner internals directly except through explicit interfaces.

B_ordered_increments.name: ROUTING model + state actions
B_ordered_increments.objective: Implement typed routing structures for Track and Input/Rhythm matrices with destination groups.

impact.state: adds routing update actions and selectors
impact.ui: none or read-only debug view only
impact.testing: fixture-free structural tests (required keys, allowed members)

required_evidence_before_edit: official docs references listed in research/rc600_claim_validation.json for ROUTING-APP-001/002/003
definition_of_done: Routing schema captures Track-vs-Input/Rhythm split and destination groups MAIN/SUB1/SUB2/PHONES.
Model validation rejects unknown destination/member keys.

B_ordered_increments.name: TRACK Bounce In/input-source model
B_ordered_increments.objective: Add per-track input-source set + bounce_enabled into TrackPlan state.

impact.schema: adds TrackInputSourceSet and TrackPlan bounce fields
impact.testing: source-set persistence and empty-source warning checks

required_evidence_before_edit: XML excerpt lines covering Bounce In source members
official docs references for Bounce In behavior
definition_of_done: All seven validated source members are represented and test-covered.
No canonical bit-packing assumptions are hardcoded into schema.

B_ordered_increments.name: ASSIGN bank typed model
B_ordered_increments.objective: Implement AssignBank with 16 typed AssignSlot entries and lightweight invariants.

impact.schema: adds x16 slot schema and required assign fields
impact.testing: slot count, required fields, and value-range checks

definition_of_done: AssignBank enforces exactly 16 slots.
Each slot supports switch/source/mode/act range/target range fields with validation errors surfaced.
do_not_attempt_yet: target semantic expansion beyond validated fields

B_ordered_increments.name: CTL FUNC control-plan model
B_ordered_increments.objective: Add mode-indexed pedal maps and ext/exp control maps into ControlPlan.

impact.testing: coverage tests for all pedal modes and ext/exp entries

required_evidence_before_edit: XML excerpt lines for ICTL/ECTL blocks
definition_of_done: ControlPlan supports validated field shape without promoting CTL-APP-003 into semantics.
Compatibility metadata stored separately from semantic fields.

B_ordered_increments.name: Fixture pack for baseline/default memories
B_ordered_increments.objective: Create controlled fixture corpus for baseline memory structures and default comparisons.

impact.testing: fixture integrity and schema conformance tests

definition_of_done: At least 3 baseline/default fixture memories load and validate.
Fixture files are documented with provenance notes.

B_ordered_increments.name: Memory diff tooling
B_ordered_increments.objective: Implement deterministic memory diff output across routing/track/assign/ctl domains.
required_evidence_before_edit: execution plan diff requirements in research/rc600_execution_plan.json
definition_of_done: Diff output stable across repeated runs.
Controlled fixture deltas produce expected structured changes.

B_ordered_increments.name: Validation report aggregation
B_ordered_increments.objective: Aggregate per-domain validation findings into one planner confidence report.
definition_of_done: Single report object includes domain pass/fail/warn and guardrail notes.
Report is serializable and snapshot-tested.

B_ordered_increments.name: Planner memory overview UI
B_ordered_increments.objective: Expose memory-level planner summary driven solely by validated state and diff/validation outputs.

impact.testing: UI rendering tests against fixed fixtures

required_evidence_before_edit: benchmark usability expectations from convergence audit
definition_of_done: User can inspect one memory's routing/track/assign/ctl summaries and validation warnings.
No direct editing yet; read-oriented confidence surface only.

B_ordered_increments.name: Planner editing flow (minimal vertical slice)
B_ordered_increments.objective: Enable constrained edits for one memory across the four core domains with immediate validation feedback.

impact.state: binds edit actions to domain reducers
impact.testing: integration tests with controlled change comparisons

definition_of_done: Single-memory edit flow works across all core domains.
Validation and diff are updated live and remain deterministic.

E_explicit_defer_list: Any canonical claim beyond validated docs/XML evidence
Automatic semantic remapping from RC-505-labeled compatibility fields
Large UI redesign before state schema stabilization

F_recommended_first_pr_scope.title: Stage 1 foundation: planner core skeleton + ROUTING typed schema
F_recommended_first_pr_scope.why: This yields the smallest mergeable foundation that converts evidence into executable planner state while minimizing scope risk.
